channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UrbanTok: A Kenyan Platform Helping Creators Earn Directly Through Local Payments
item.description: UrbanTok, a fresh Kenyan digital platform, was launched in April 2026 with the aim of empowering African content creators to earn sustainable income right from the start. Unlike international platform...

item.title: Joburg Authorities Continue Demolitions to Address Illegal Buildings and Crime
item.description: Johannesburg Mayor Dada Morero has affirmed that the City will persist with demolishing illegal structures as part of a broader effort to reclaim parts of the inner city plagued by unlawful activity. ...

item.title: EFCC officers clash with UNIUYO hospital staff during medical report verification
item.description: Tori don break for University of Uyo Teaching Hospital, Akwa Ibom State as some EFCC operatives allegedly beat and carry four staff members away, including Prof. Effiong Ekpe, Deputy Chairman of the M...

item.title: A Satirical Take on the 2026 Australian Federal Budget
item.description: The article offers a satirical commentary on the 2026 Australian federal budget, framing it in a humorous, exaggerated manner rather than providing a traditional news analysis. The piece pokes fun at ...

item.title: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari chooses to retain Bhabanipur seat and vacates Nandigram
item.description: In a significant political development, West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has decided to retain the Bhabanipur assembly constituency and vacate his traditional stronghold of Nandigram. This ...

item.title: Tanzanian Investments Boost Kenya’s Industrial Growth and Regional Integration
item.description: In recent weeks, the strong historic ties between Kenya and Tanzania have been highlighted through high-profile events and significant economic investments. Kenyan President William Ruto’s state visit...

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Iconic Photos from 'A Night at the Opera' (1935)
item.description: Released in November 1935, 'A Night at the Opera' is considered one of the Marx Brothers' most celebrated films and their first project with Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer. Directed by Sam Wood, the film marked ...

item.title: Inspector-General Disu Approves Redeployment Of 132 Police Officers From Edo State Command
item.description: Na the internal police signal wey dem issue on May 12, 2026, Inspector-General of Police, Olatunji Disu don approve say 132 police officers go comot for Edo State Command as part of ongoing administra...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Portraits of Jennifer Jones in Duel in the Sun (1946)
item.description: This article showcases a collection of 40 vintage portraits of actress Jennifer Jones on the set of the 1946 Technicolor film “Duel in the Sun.” The images capture Jones in her transformative role as ...

item.title: Mang Inasal Showcases Filipino Flavors and Hospitality at ASEAN-Korea Music Festival 2026
item.description: Mang Inasal, the Philippines’ well-loved grill expert, highlighted Filipino flavors at the ASEAN-Korea Music Festival '2026 ROUND in the Philippines,' held at the Araneta Coliseum from April 18 to 19,...

item.title: Karachi Court Grants Police Three-Day Custody of Suspected Cocaine Supplier
item.description: In Karachi, a court has granted police a three-day physical remand of a woman suspected of running a cocaine supply network in the city. Anmol, also known as Pinki, was arrested from her apartment in ...

item.title: Trump Administration Outlines Counterterrorism Strategy Targeting Domestic Political Groups
item.description: The Trump administration released its 2026 U.S. Counterterrorism Strategy, focusing on what it calls 'violent secular political groups.' According to the strategy, the administration plans to prioriti...

item.title: Ghana Hosts High-Level Conference on Reparatory Justice Following UN Resolution
item.description: The government of Ghana is getting ready to host a very important high-level conference on reparatory justice in Accra from 17 to 19 June 2026. This meeting comes after the United Nations General Asse...

item.title: Man Injured in Altercation with Teen E-Bike Riders in Huntington Beach
item.description: A man in Huntington Beach was injured over the weekend after an altercation with a large group of teenagers riding electric bikes near the beach. According to Sam El-Said, he and his wife were riding ...

item.title: Three Church Leaders Killed in Kangpokpi, Manipur Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: In a deeply troubling incident in Manipur, three prominent church leaders were shot dead in the Kangpokpi district. This shocking attack has raised serious concerns among the local communities and aut...

item.title: Philippe Bresson and Grace Kahaki Sweep Kalasha Awards with 'Kash Money'
item.description: Philippe Bresson and Grace Kahaki have made waves in the Kenyan entertainment scene after Insignia Productions, the company they co-lead, scooped multiple awards at the 2026 Kalasha Awards. Their crim...

item.title: Solution for Today’s Framed Movie Puzzle – 13 May
item.description: Framed is a browser-based puzzle game similar to Wordle but with a cinematic twist, requiring players to guess the title of a movie from a series of still frames. Each day presents a new challenge wit...

item.title: Vusimusi Matlala to be transferred from KZN prison to Gauteng ahead of trial
item.description: Attempted murder suspect Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala, who has been labelled an escape risk by correctional services officials, is set to be moved from eBongweni Correctional Centre in KwaZulu-Natal to Kgos...

item.title: Tanzanian Court Rejects Banks’ Lawsuit Against Power Company
item.description: In Tanzania, the court has officially dismissed the lawsuit brought by several banks against a local power firm. The banks had claimed that the power company had failed to meet its financial obligatio...

item.title: Transformations of Early 20th Century New York City
item.description: New York City in the early 1900s was undergoing a remarkable transformation, positioning itself as a symbol of modernity and ambition at the dawn of the American Century. The city skyline began to cha...
